description: House number component of a street address | Alphanumeric up to 10 characters (e.g. 12, 535, 358C)
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT CAST(block AS STRING) RLIKE '^[A-Za-z0-9]{1,10}$'

description: Street name component of a physical postal address | X(32) alphanumeric with spacing
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT street_name IS NULL AND (LENGTH(CAST(street_name AS STRING)) > 32 OR LENGTH(CAST(street_name AS STRING)) = 0)

description: Based on ISO 8601, assumed to be in UTC +8 | YYYY-MM
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT CAST(month AS STRING) RLIKE '^[0-9]{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$'

description: Based on ISO 8601, assumed to be in UTC +8 | YYYY
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT CAST(lease_commence_date AS STRING) RLIKE '^[0-9]{4}$'

description: Column 'block' must exist in 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT `block` FROM `hdb_resale_prices` LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists

description: Values in 'block' must be valid string
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `block` IS NULL AND CAST(`block` AS STRING) IS NULL

description: Column 'block' must have maximum length of 10
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `block` IS NULL AND LENGTH(CAST(`block` AS STRING)) > 10

description: Column 'block' must have minimum length of 1
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `block` IS NULL AND LENGTH(CAST(`block` AS STRING)) < 1

description: Column 'block' must match pattern '^[0-9A-Za-z]+$'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `block` IS NULL AND NOT CAST(`block` AS STRING) RLIKE '^[0-9A-Za-z]+$'

description: Column 'block' must not contain NULL values
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE `block` IS NULL

description: Validates that critical columns do not contain null values to ensure data completeness
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE month IS NULL OR town IS NULL OR flat_type IS NULL OR block IS NULL OR street_name IS NULL OR storey_range IS NULL OR floor_area_sqm IS NULL OR flat_model IS NULL OR lease_commence_date IS NULL OR remaining_lease IS NULL OR resale_price IS NULL

description: Column 'flat_model' must exist in 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT `flat_model` FROM `hdb_resale_prices` LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists

description: Values in 'flat_model' must be valid string
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `flat_model` IS NULL AND CAST(`flat_model` AS STRING) IS NULL

description: Column 'flat_model' must not contain NULL values
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE `flat_model` IS NULL

description: Column 'flat_type' must exist in 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT `flat_type` FROM `hdb_resale_prices` LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists

description: Count of invalid values in 'flat_type' of 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `flat_type` IS NULL AND NOT CAST(`flat_type` AS STRING) IN ('1 ROOM', '2 ROOM', '3 ROOM', '4 ROOM', '5 ROOM', 'EXECUTIVE', 'MULTI-GENERATION')

description: Values in 'flat_type' must be valid string
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `flat_type` IS NULL AND CAST(`flat_type` AS STRING) IS NULL

description: Column 'flat_type' must not contain NULL values
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE `flat_type` IS NULL

description: Validates that floor area must be less than 200
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE CAST(floor_area_sqm AS BIGINT) >= 200

description: Column 'floor_area_sqm' must exist in 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT `floor_area_sqm` FROM `hdb_resale_prices` LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists

description: Values in 'floor_area_sqm' must be valid number
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `floor_area_sqm` IS NULL AND CAST(`floor_area_sqm` AS DOUBLE) IS NULL

description: Column 'floor_area_sqm' must not contain NULL values
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE `floor_area_sqm` IS NULL

description: Count of duplicate rows in 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT `month`, `block`, `street_name`, `flat_type`, `storey_range` FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE (((NOT `month` IS NULL AND NOT `block` IS NULL) AND NOT `street_name` IS NULL) AND NOT `flat_type` IS NULL) AND NOT `storey_range` IS NULL GROUP BY `month`, `block`, `street_name`, `flat_type`, `storey_range` HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS _dup

description: Total row count for 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices`

description: Column 'lease_commence_date' must exist in 'hdb_resale_prices'
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT `lease_commence_date` FROM `hdb_resale_prices` LIMIT 0) AS _vowl_column_exists

description: Values in 'lease_commence_date' must be valid integer
rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE NOT `lease_commence_date` IS NULL AND (CAST(`lease_commence_date` AS DOUBLE) IS NULL OR CAST(`lease_commence_date` AS DOUBLE) <> CAST(`lease_commence_date` AS BIGINT))

rule: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hdb_resale_prices` WHERE `lease_commence_date` IS NULL
